captured_scope: Current visible requests and assistant outcomes
Canonical GitHub history and verified merged artifacts
Measured supplied source packs and bounded reconstruction batches
Historical source claims preserved with conflict and proof labels

Every provider console and production configuration
Universal requirement-to-runtime completion and owner acceptance
truth_boundary: Jarvis is consolidated across the verified available source universe, not across all possible historical or hidden sources. Missing material remains explicitly pending or blocked.
